summary: Iteration 15 - UID system, referral toggle, 32 country codes, cart offer prices: All features working correctly. UID generator utility functions verified (DIH-{PROGRAM}-{INITIALS}-{SEQ} format). Referral toggle and referrer name field present on EnrollmentPage and CartPage. Cart displays strikethrough offer prices correctly. Backend enrollment API stores referred_by_name field. Fixed CartPage COUNTRIES array from 17 to 32 countries. All 9 backend tests pass. Phone OTP is MOCKED.

issues: Price shows USD 0 for AWRP program - may be a tier selection issue

critical_code_review_comments: uid_generator.py: get_program_initials() correctly filters small words (of, the, and) and returns max 6 chars
uid_generator.py: get_person_initials() returns initials of name parts, max 3 chars, 'XX' for empty
uid_generator.py: generate_uid() uses uid_counters collection with auto-increment sequence
payments.py: generate_participant_uids() called when payment status changes to 'paid' (line 297)
emails.py: enrollment_confirmation_email includes UID and referred_by_name in participant rows
PaymentSuccessPage.jsx: Displays UID with data-testid='receipt-uid-{i}' and referred_by_name
EnrollmentPage.jsx: COUNTRIES array has 32 entries - verified
CartPage.jsx: COUNTRIES array FIXED from 17 to 32 entries
CartCheckoutPage.jsx: COUNTRIES array has 32 entries - verified
CartPage.jsx: 'Referred by a Divine Iris member' toggle at data-testid='cp-referred-toggle-{id}-{idx}'
EnrollmentPage.jsx: 'Referred by a Divine Iris member' toggle at data-testid='p-referred-toggle-{index}'
CartContext.js: Stores offer_price_aed/inr/usd when adding items to cart
CartPage.jsx: getItemOfferPrice() returns offer prices from cart item data
CartPage.jsx: Strikethrough display shows offer price in gold, regular price with line-through
seed_data_creation: Test program with offer prices created via API and deleted. Enrollment test data created during API tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 15 features verified: 1) UID generation working (DIH-{PROGRAM_INITIALS}-{NAME_INITIALS}-{SEQ}), 2) Referral toggle + referrer name field on EnrollmentPage and CartPage, 3) All 3 pages have 32 countries (fixed CartPage COUNTRIES array), 4) Cart displays strikethrough offer prices, 5) Backend checkout uses offer prices, 6) PaymentSuccessPage shows UID and referral name, 7) Confirmation email includes UID and referral name. Phone OTP is MOCKED (mock_otp returned in API).

mocked_features.phone_otp: MOCKED - OTP generated server-side, returned in API response field 'mock_otp' for testing
mocked_features.stripe_payments: Cannot fully test Stripe payment flow - requires real payment

uid_generation.payment_status_returns_uid: PASS - /api/payments/status returns participants array with uid field

referral_toggle.backend_stores_referred_by_name: PASS - ParticipantData model has referred_by_name field

cart_offer_prices.cart_page_strikethrough: PASS - Shows 'USD 180' in gold with 'USD 199' struck through
cart_offer_prices.cart_checkout_strikethrough: PASS - Order summary shows strikethrough offer prices
